files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+[2026-01-09T01:53:08-05:00] From: opus-phpp | Subject: PHP patterns complete but evaluator.rs has conflicts
+
+PHP heredoc patterns are implemented:
+- heredoc.rs: ScriptLanguage::Php enum variant + from_command detection  
+- ast_matcher.rs: 9 PHP patterns (unlink, rmdir, exec, system, shell_exec, passthru, proc_open, popen, backticks)
+
+However, evaluator.rs has concurrent edit conflicts from multiple agents working on deadline functionality. Someone added deadline parameter to evaluate_packs_with_allowlists/evaluate_heredoc but didn't update all call sites consistently.
+
+Errors: deadline variable used but not in scope, function call argument count mismatches.
+
+Need someone to resolve the evaluator.rs conflicts before PHP patterns can be tested end-to-end.
